category_sources: source_facts.description says pg_partman is a partition management extension for PostgreSQL.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as pg_partman.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and doc directory provide pg_partman documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PostgreSQL partition management; source_facts.executables lists maintenance helper scripts.
